name: ENERGY STAR K-12 Schools
key_points: K-12 school districts spend more than $8 billion per year on energy.
More than 30 percent of school energy use can be waste.
Low-cost measures can save around 10 percent.
how_pulse_agent_uses_it: Frames the energy module around waste detection and low-cost operational action rather than expensive hardware.

name: NASEO Energy Efficient and Healthy K-12 Public School Facilities
key_points: Space heating is the largest education-sector end use.
Cooling, lighting, and ventilation are major controllable loads.
how_pulse_agent_uses_it: Shapes ScheduleGhost energy features around schedule, weather, occupancy, lights, HVAC, and event runtime.

name: Building Data Genome Project 2
key_points: Open dataset with hourly non-residential meter readings.
Useful for forecasting, anomaly detection, benchmarking, and building energy analysis.
how_pulse_agent_uses_it: Provides a real-data source for future energy model benchmarking. The repo includes a fetch script for a small sample.

name: OEDI Commercial Reference Building: Secondary School
key_points: Secondary school reference models are available across climate zones and building vintages.
Useful for school-specific energy simulation assumptions.
how_pulse_agent_uses_it: Supports realistic synthetic baselines for school energy consumption when real school utility data is unavailable.

name: NREL ComStock Public Datasets
key_points: ComStock describes timeseries and annual commercial building energy use at end-use level.
Can be filtered for school-like commercial building profiles.
how_pulse_agent_uses_it: Future source for stronger energy baselines and end-use explanations.

name: DOE Green Button
key_points: Customers can download and share utility usage data by choice.
Useful for future real school bill or interval-data import.
how_pulse_agent_uses_it: Defines the privacy-safe route for bringing real utility data into the backend later.

name: WWF Food Waste Warriors Fact Sheet
key_points: Average school food waste can be around 39 pounds per student per year.
Food waste measurement programs can reduce waste.
how_pulse_agent_uses_it: Supports the waste/event module and connects Compost AI logs to event planning.

name: EPA WaterSense Statistics and Facts
key_points: Leaks can waste large volumes of water before anyone notices.
Early detection makes leak alerts environmentally and financially meaningful.
how_pulse_agent_uses_it: Supports Aqualert/LeakListener alert framing and water impact estimates.
